rationale: The two notes show unusually specific overlap in empirical setting and data infrastructure (same U.S. convenience-chain context, 111 stores, loyalty-card histories around Nov 2003–Nov 2005), which suggests more than a generic background citation. Conceptually, the cited paper’s core idea that some purchases are a negative signal of future outcomes (“Harbingers of Failure”) is closely aligned with the citing paper’s core effect that some category purchases predict future defection (“canary categories”), so this pair is worth full relation judgment.
